  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not."
  },

    "R1.4": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
